title: How a Godly Man Leads Without Needing the Title
caption:
Nobody gave him the title.

He just started going first.

First to apologize. First to serve. First to take the hit when it wasn't his fault but it was his responsibility. First to do the thankless work nobody asked for.

Christ didn't get a title before he washed feet. He didn't wait for the room to recognize him before he led. He just started paying the cost — and people followed because you follow a man like that.

Real leadership has nothing to do with a position. It's a posture. Go first into the cost, serve without an audience, absorb what the people around you shouldn't have to carry.

And do it from your knees — because all of this is available without God, but it won't hold. Strip the faith out and you've got ego dressed as service.

"Whoever wants to be great among you must be your servant." — Mark 10:43

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #servantleadership #christianity #scripture
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
